feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP MDG feature File Download and File Upload.
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have a question related to functionality on file upload and file download. Can we use this for mass creation of material/bp? is there any standard guide to activate the functionality?

 

Thanks,

Swetha

entry.title: Change company code from XYZ to ABC
entry.content:
Hello all, 

We have a requirement to change the company from XYZ to ABC. In real time scenarios does SAP system allows us to change the company code from one to another. If yes, what would be strategy to do it without effecting or impacting the master data and transactional data. 

Here in our we do not have any transactional data posted to this company code. 

can anyone help me with the issue 

Thank you

entry.title: Validation on template correctness for file upload in SAP MDG
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

We are considering File upload option to mass upload master data for processing in Central Governance in SAP MDG. Is there any condition (available in standard or) we can build to check for the template correctness to ensure that file uploaded by user is in correct format?

Appreciate your guidance!!

Regards,

Swetha

entry.title: MDI UUID error after Success Factors data refresh
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

One of our customers is using S4HANA in the public cloud and SAP MDI for master data replication.

SuccessFactors (PRD) --> MDI (PRD) --> SAP Cloud 4 Project (PRD)

SuccessFactors (TEST) --> MDI (TEST) --> SAP Cloud 4 Project (TEST)

One of the scenarios involves employee master data from SuccessFactors to C4P. The customer performed a data refresh from the SuccessFactors PRD environment to the SuccessFactors TEST environment. Since then, employee master data replication has been failing in MDI due to missing or unrecognized UUID identifiers.

Currently, our only option seems to be reimplementing MDI from scratch to generate new UUIDs assigned by MDI for the scenarios to sync the data again. Do you know of any other options? Or should scenarios involving MDI avoid data refreshes between environments altogether?

Thank you,

entry.title: Can DQM force uppercase of international version addresses? (we use MDG w DQM)
entry.content:
We are running SAP MDG for business partner management (customer/supplier). We call DQM for address enrichment and cleanse and we configured to make addressing use UPPERCASE. We would like to do the same uppercasing of international version addresses that the user enters.  Does DQM support this?  We cannot find a spot to configure it.

Thanks

MDG 9.2 SP09

entry.title: Fetching Tax Categories from Sales org in sap mdg BP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using the MDG for BP.

We use Class CL_MDG_BS_ECC_BP_CHECK_SERVICE of method DFLT_TAX_IND_READ_BY_VKORG to fetch the tax categories based on multiple Sales org.

Noticed that this method holds multiple nested loop with multiple select queries.

Is there any alternate SAP NOTE or a different class to achieve the same.

noticed that 2795026 note is already in place.

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: Create Supplier along with attahments in S4System from third party system
entry.content:
Hi 

we are on the SAP HANA 2020 initial shipment stack, I have a requirement where I need to create a Supplier along with a few attachments.

Which Service or API I can use?

entry.title: Restrict CR types based on Authorization Group in MDG-BP
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I have a requirement in which i have to restrict CR types based on Authorization groups

For ex - If a CR type is for Hungary then when doing the change from edit button in UI only HU change requrest should be visible rest others should be deleted.

I am trying to create an implicit enhancement in get_data method of cl_mdg_bs_cr_types_feeder class to put a condition like

If data model EQ 'BP'.

then will check for authorization and based on that i will implement a conditional statement to delete unwanted CR's but in the above method i debugged a lot but i'm not able to find the field in which authorization group is stored.

Can someone help me out?

entry.title: Convenience API Class in SAP MDG Customer
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using MDG for Customer.

There are around 10 uibb's in Create Change request page.

To open the Change request , system takes some time to open it.

Took st12 , corrected few of the points .

Observed that they have used convenience api class cl_usmd_conv_som_gov_api to take the Change request id in all the uibb feeder class get_data. Hope some performance can be fine tuned in that.

Is there a class or method where i can keep the code only once and reuse in all the uibb's get_Data till the Activation of CR.

Kindly suggest me the same.

Thanks.

KarthikS

entry.title: Multiple values not getting retained in List UIBB in BP.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing issue, Values in Custom List UIBB are not getting retained. When we click on new button the first value is visible, upon hitting new button to add New entry in List the older value is getting removed.

We already followed SAP doc but still we are unable to find out issue. Please someone can guide us.

entry.title: How to display material entity data of one standard UIBB in another standard UIBB?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

While creating a material, I would like to know as how I can display the material entity data of one UIBB in another UIBB.

Characteristic value(Characteristics) in Material description(Descriptions).

 

Could you please help me on this.

Thanks in advance.

 

 

 

regards

Chandra Kishore.

entry.title: Employee Mini Master in MDG
entry.content:
Hi, We are planning to load Employee Mini Master into SAP MDG as per some requirements. Is it possible to load Employee Mini Master into SAP MDG.

Regards,

BK.

entry.title: Creating a Contact Person from Supplier CR UI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a question, can anyone tell me how the system understands which account group to consider when we create a Contact Person from a Supplier Master MDG CR UI? I believe we do not get to choose any Account Group of the Contact person to be created when we are inside the Supplier Master CR UI. I would like to know if there is any mapping of account groups (between main Supplier and Contact person) exists in regards to this mapping in SPRO.

My requirement is to create Contact persons with different Account Groups for different Suppliers(having different Account Groups).

Any reply would be much appreciated.

Thanks.

entry.title: Flush method is sap mdg fpm
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have used the custom uibb in MDG-C where i have a doubt as below.

When we create the Change request for Change Process, is the below code is really required as there will not be any change when the user click on the "Create Change Request" button. Kindly confirm me the same.

Consider performance, felt like to keep additional logic to skip below code when user click create CR button. Thanks

    CALL METHOD super->if_fpm_guibb_list~flush
      EXPORTING
        it_change_log   = it_change_log
        it_data         = it_data
        iv_old_lead_sel = iv_old_lead_sel
        iv_new_lead_sel = iv_new_lead_sel.

Regards,

KArthik S

entry.title: MDG functionality has a navigation issue when clicking on any change request
entry.content:
Hi Experts, in MDG S4,it is observed that in MDG functionality has a navigation issue when clicking on any change request, it opens Business partner search page , whereas it should give a detailed view of Change request. Please suggest the solution for this.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Data Migration in SAP S/4HANA RISE
entry.content:
Unlocking Success: Data Migration in SAP S/4HANA RISE

Introduction

Data migration is a critical component of any SAP S/4HANA RISE transformation journey. Moving from legacy systems to SAP S/4HANA requires a structured approach to ensure data integrity, accuracy, and compliance. This post explores key strategies, challenges, and best practices for a successful data migration in SAP S/4HANA RISE.

Understanding Data Migration in SAP S/4HANA RISE

Data migration involves transferring master data, transactional data, and historical records from existing ERP systems to SAP S/4HANA. This process includes extraction, transformation, validation, and loading (ETVL), ensuring business continuity and minimal disruption.

Key Phases of Data Migration

  1. Assessment & Planning

    • Identify data sources, dependencies, and cleansing requirements.
    • Define data governance and security policies.
    • Align migration objectives with business goals.

  2. Data Extraction & Cleansing

    • Extract relevant data from legacy systems.
    • Remove duplicates, correct inconsistencies, and enrich data quality.
    • Ensure compliance with SAP S/4HANA data models.

  3. Data Transformation & Mapping

    • Convert legacy data structures to align with SAP S/4HANA.
    • Use SAP Migration Cockpit and ETL tools for data transformation.
    • Validate mappings to prevent data loss.

  4. Data Loading & Validation

    • Utilize SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit, LSMW, and BAPIs for loading.
    • Perform iterative test loads in a sandbox environment.
    • Validate data integrity through reconciliation reports.

  5. Go-Live & Post-Migration Activities

    • Execute final cutover and ensure business readiness.
    • Monitor performance, resolve issues, and refine data processes.
    • Establish a continuous data quality improvement strategy.

Best Practices for a Successful Migration

✔ Early Data Assessment: Conduct data profiling and cleansing before migration to reduce complexity. ✔ Use Standard SAP Tools: Leverage SAP Migration Cockpit, SAP Data Services, and CDS Views for streamlined migration. ✔ Automate Where Possible: Reduce manual interventions by implementing automation for data extraction and validation. ✔ Perform Multiple Test Cycles: Conduct multiple dry runs to detect and resolve issues before go-live. ✔ Ensure Stakeholder Alignment: Engage business and IT teams to align expectations and ensure smooth execution.

Overcoming Common Challenges

🚧 Data Quality Issues: Implement data cleansing tools and governance policies. 🚧 Complex Data Structures: Use a phased approach with structured data transformation. 🚧 Downtime Minimization: Plan cutover activities carefully to minimize business impact. 🚧 Compliance & Security: Ensure data handling aligns with regulatory requirements.

Conclusion

Successful data migration to SAP S/4HANA RISE requires careful planning, execution, and validation. By leveraging SAP’s standard tools, automating processes, and maintaining high data quality, organizations can unlock the full potential of their SAP S/4HANA transformation.

Are you preparing for a data migration to SAP S/4HANA RISE? Share your thoughts and experiences in the comments!

entry.title: How to setup DFR Web Service messages (DRF) from S4 for EWM Decentral for material master replicat ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

We are exploring options and performing POC for DRF Material Master replication to SAP EWM Decentral using DRF Webservice option.

So far, we have configured the service and able to reach EWM system. But it is failing due to excess data sent from S4, for example company code. Need your expert advice on how this can be resolved, or what's your experience with the webservice. 

FYI - We tried IDOC approach using DRF and it worked with Reduced message type.

entry.title: SAP MDG CLass Characteristics Derivations Not working after Service pack updating from 9 to 12
entry.content:
Hi All,

we are running on SAP MASTER DATA GOVERNANCE 9.2  and EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 with HDB Support pack 9.

After the implementation of the Support Packs 10, 11 and 12 on the SAP System we are facing issues like

  • Derivations done using BADI USMD_RULE_SERVICE_CROSS_ET with Derive method  for Class Characteristics not working as Previous 
  • When creating new materials we automatically assign classes based on the CR type and Material Group Some single value characteristics are duplicated on the UI screen and  causing fatal errors when saving.

When saving the CR some characteristic values disappear from the UI screen but the entered values remain present in the staging tables 

Any Inputs?

Thanks,

Panga

entry.title: MDG CE Groupings and Number ranges
entry.content:
Dear experts

I have read in the MDG Cloud Edition documentation, that the groupings and the number ranges are fixed and cannot be changed. I wanted to know how does it work in the case of the replication towards S4 HANA. Is it possible to transcodificate the original grouping from MDG-CE into the custom ones which are in S4 HANA, for example using a middleware and a custom field in MDG to store this information?

Will MDG be still able to recognise the key mapping of the record? 

Did anyone ever experienced this problem?

 

Thank you very much

best regards

entry.title: Suppress Custom uibb in sap mdg Customer
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have created the custom uibb in sap mdg for customer few months before and now we want to remove the block from the UI.

We have removed the block from the UI via configuration.

Doubt is, Is there an option to suppress the block completely so that when we create the Change request we observed that all the methods like get definition/flush/get_data/process event been called.

We want to suppress so that all these method of standard code will not run as it will be better in terms of performance. Thanks.

Kindly suggest me the same so that i dont want the custom entity to be called when the CR is created. 

Regards,

Karthik S
